productDisplayName: W Women Multi Colour Printed Kurta
description: Composition Multi coloured kurta with a bateau neckline, made of 100% cotton, has set-in sleeves with a mid-sleeve buttoned flap, a half buttoned placket with brass buttons, and pink and blue ethnic print with a distressed look Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron This piece of art by w is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this ethnic kurta and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it when hanging out with your friends by teaming it with denims and pumps for a casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M Height-5.7", Chest-33"
